title: Create: Curios Jetpack & Backtank
description: Use Create jetpack and backtanks in Curios/Trinkets back slot.
body:
About

This mod adds Curios (or Trinkets) compatibility for Create Jetpack, allowing you to equip both your jetpack and chestplate simultaneously. The mod also adds Curios compatibility for backtanks from the base Create mod.

Once equiped in your Curios or Trinkets back slot, your jetpack or backtank will still function as if it was in your chestplate slot, but won't grant any protection bonus.

Media

Curios compatibility (Forge):

Trinkets compatibility (Fabric):

Dependencies

You'll need Create installed, along side either Curios API or Trinkets depending on your mod loader.

Note that in 1.20+ Create Jetpack is optional (curios compatibility will still work with Create's backtanks).

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the Modrinth launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
